code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant S as Student
    participant API as AttachUpload Handler
    participant S3 as S3 Storage
    participant DB as PostgreSQL
    participant N as NotifyAdvisors
    participant A as Advisor

    S->>API: POST /journey/nodes/:id/uploads/presign
    API->>S3: PresignPut(objectKey)
    S3-->>API: Signed URL
    API-->>S: {presign_url, object_key}
    
    S->>S3: PUT file to presigned URL
    S3-->>S: 200 OK + ETag
    
    S->>API: POST /journey/nodes/:id/uploads/attach
    API->>DB: Begin transaction
    API->>DB: INSERT document_versions
    API->>DB: INSERT node_instance_slot_attachments
    API->>DB: UPDATE node_instances.state = 'submitted'
    API->>DB: Commit transaction
    API-->>N: NotifyAdvisorsOnSubmission (async)
    N->>DB: Get advisors for student
    N->>DB: INSERT admin_notifications
    API-->>S: 200 OK
    
    A->>API: PATCH /admin/attachments/:id/review
    API->>DB: Verify advisor assigned to student
    API->>DB: UPDATE attachment.status
    API->>DB: UPDATE node_instances.state
    API-->>A: 200 OK
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要梳理一下学生上传附件的完整流程。核心是学生先拿到预签名URL，把文件传到S3，然后再通知我们的系统完成关联。最后导师可以审核这些附件。
明白。那第一步是学生向AttachUpload Handler请求预签名地址？然后Handler去S3生成PresignPut链接？
对，路径是POST /journey/nodes/:id/uploads/presign。S3返回Signed URL后，Handler要把presign_url和object_key一起给学生。
好的，学生拿到地址后直接PUT文件到S3，S3返回200 OK和ETag。接下来学生要通知系统关联这个上传吧？
没错，学生调POST /journey/nodes/:id/uploads/attach。这里有个关键点——Handler要用事务写PostgreSQL：先插入document_versions，再插入node_instance_slot_attachments，最后把node_instances.state更新为submitted。
事务提交之后，异步通知NotifyAdvisors服务？我看到有个NotifyAdvisorsOnSubmission。
是的，异步的。NotifyAdvisors要去DB查这个学生的advisors列表，然后往admin_notifications表里插入通知记录。
流程清楚了。最后导师审核的部分：Advisor调PATCH /admin/attachments/:id/review，Handler先Verify advisor assigned to student，然后更新attachment.status和node_instances.state？
完全正确。验证通过后更新状态，返回200 OK给导师。整个闭环就完成了。
